name: kardio.js
description: Interactive card diagram library for the web. Create drag-and-drop diagrams with a simple DSL - no framework, no build step, just one JavaScript file.

scripts.start: python -m http.server 8000 || python3 -m http.server 8000 || npx serve .
scripts.demo: echo 'Öppna kardio-example.html i webbläsaren för att se demon'

author: yllemo
